'''√h-zh-v''' ('''hazhava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:politick|politick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:politick|politick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-zh-v
|-
! Lemma
| hazhava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhavithi|hazhavithi]] || [[word:hazhaviji|hazhaviji]] || [[word:hazhavishi|hazhavishi]] || [[word:hazhavi|hazhavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhavuthuth|hazhavuthuth]] || [[word:hazhavujuj|hazhavujuj]] || [[word:hazhavushush|hazhavushush]] || [[word:hazhav|hazhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhavuthu|hazhavuthu]] || [[word:hazhavuju|hazhavuju]] || [[word:hazhavushu|hazhavushu]] || [[word:hazhavu|hazhavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhavufuth|hazhavufuth]] || [[word:hazhavufuj|hazhavufuj]] || [[word:hazhavufush|hazhavufush]] || [[word:hazhavuf|hazhavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhavethe|hazhavethe]] || [[word:hazhaveje|hazhaveje]] || [[word:hazhaveshe|hazhaveshe]] || [[word:hazhave|hazhave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhavothoth|hazhavothoth]] || [[word:hazhavojoj|hazhavojoj]] || [[word:hazhavoshosh|hazhavoshosh]] || [[word:hazhav|hazhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhavotho|hazhavotho]] || [[word:hazhavojo|hazhavojo]] || [[word:hazhavosho|hazhavosho]] || [[word:hazhavo|hazhavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhavofoth|hazhavofoth]] || [[word:hazhavofoj|hazhavofoj]] || [[word:hazhavofosh|hazhavofosh]] || [[word:hazhavof|hazhavof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhavïfïf|hazhavïfïf]] || [[word:hazhavïfïf|hazhavïfïf]] || [[word:hazhavïfïf|hazhavïfïf]] || [[word:hazhavïfïf|hazhavïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]] || [[word:hazhavïf|hazhavïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hazhavæthæ|hazhavæthæ]] || [[word:hazhavæjæ|hazhavæjæ]] || [[word:hazhavæshæ|hazhavæshæ]] || [[word:hazhavæ|hazhavæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazhavathath|hazhavathath]] || [[word:hazhavajaj|hazhavajaj]] || [[word:hazhavashash|hazhavashash]] || [[word:hazhav|hazhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazhavatha|hazhavatha]] || [[word:hazhavaja|hazhavaja]] || [[word:hazhavasha|hazhavasha]] || [[word:hazhava|hazhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazhavafath|hazhavafath]] || [[word:hazhavafaj|hazhavafaj]] || [[word:hazhavafash|hazhavafash]] || [[word:hazhavaf|hazhavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hazhavasha|hazhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohazhavasha|gohazhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihazhavasha|gokihazhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hazhavnüsha|hazhavnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohazhavnknüsha|gohazhavnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhavnüsha|gokihazhavnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hazhavshësha|hazhavshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohazhavnkshësha|gohazhavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihazhavshësha|gokihazhavshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhavrosha|hazhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhavnkrosha|gohazhavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhavrosha|gokihazhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhavmusha|hazhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhavnkmusha|gohazhavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhavmusha|gokihazhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hazhavsherasha|hazhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohazhavnksherasha|gohazhavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihazhavsherasha|gokihazhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hazhavngasha|hazhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohazhavnkngasha|gohazhavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihazhavngasha|gokihazhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hazhavyasha|hazhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohazhavnkyasha|gohazhavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihazhavyasha|gokihazhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hazhavyamasha|hazhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohazhavnkyamasha|gohazhavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihazhavyamasha|gokihazhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhavnüshësha|hazhavnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhavnknüshësha|gohazhavnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhavnüshësha|gokihazhavnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhavnürosha|hazhavnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhavnknürosha|gohazhavnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhavnürosha|gokihazhavnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhavnümusha|hazhavnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhavnknümusha|gohazhavnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhavnümusha|gokihazhavnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhavshënüsha|hazhavshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhavnkshënüsha|gohazhavnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhavshënüsha|gokihazhavshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhavshërosha|hazhavshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhavnkshërosha|gohazhavnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhavshërosha|gokihazhavshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhavshëmusha|hazhavshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhavnkshëmusha|gohazhavnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhavshëmusha|gokihazhavshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhavronüsha|hazhavronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhavnkronüsha|gohazhavnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhavronüsha|gokihazhavronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhavroshësha|hazhavroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhavnkroshësha|gohazhavnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhavroshësha|gokihazhavroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hazhavromusha|hazhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohazhavnkromusha|gohazhavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihazhavromusha|gokihazhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hazhavmunüsha|hazhavmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohazhavnkmunüsha|gohazhavnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihazhavmunüsha|gokihazhavmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hazhavmushësha|hazhavmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohazhavnkmushësha|gohazhavnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihazhavmushësha|gokihazhavmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hazhavmurosha|hazhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohazhavnkmurosha|gohazhavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihazhavmurosha|gokihazhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hazhav|hazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hæzhæv|hæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohazhav|hohazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohæzhæv|hohæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohazhav|hohohazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohæzhæv|hohohæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nühazhav|nühazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nühæzhæv|nühæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünühazhav|nünühazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünühæzhæv|nünühæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïhazhav|nïhazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïhæzhæv|nïhæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïhazhav|nïnïhazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïhæzhæv|nïnïhæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhazhav|luhazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhæzhæv|luhæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhazhav|luluhazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhæzhæv|luluhæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihazhav|lihazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihæzhæv|lihæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihazhav|lilihazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihæzhæv|lilihæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohazhav|kohazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohæzhæv|kohæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohazhav|kokohazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohæzhæv|kokohæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehazhav|kehazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehæzhæv|kehæzhæv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehazhav|kekehazhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehæzhæv|kekehæzhæv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
